techStack.title: Technology toolbox for modern business systems

testimonials.heading: What your system should improve
testimonials.bodyPrimary: The goal is not more software for its own sake. The goal is faster response, cleaner requests, better handoff, and less repeated manual work.
testimonials.bodySecondary: Every project starts with the business problem and the simplest useful version.

items.quote: Patients should be able to request appointments without waiting for staff to answer every repeated question manually.
items.author: Clinic automation

items.quote: Real estate agents should receive cleaner leads, not vague messages that require ten manual follow-up questions.
items.author: Real estate automation

items.quote: WhatsApp conversations should be easier to organize, summarize, and hand to the right person.
items.author: WhatsApp workflows

items.quote: A website should help customers take the next step, not only describe the company.
items.author: Website workflows

contactBridge.title: Ready to build the system your business actually needs?
contactBridge.subtitle: Tell us what you want to improve: customer support, appointment requests, lead follow-up, WhatsApp workflows, apps, dashboards, or your website.
contactBridge.cardBody: We will help you define the simplest useful version and turn it into a working system.

blueprints.heading: Choose the system your business needs first

sections.title: Customer automation

items.title: Respond faster
items.body: Assistants and WhatsApp flows can answer common questions and collect information before staff step in.

items.title: Capture cleaner leads
items.body: Inquiry forms and automation can ask the right questions before a customer reaches your team.

items.title: Reduce manual follow-up
items.body: Appointment requests, service requests, and real estate leads can move through a clear workflow.

items.title: See what is happening
items.body: Dashboards show inquiries, appointments, requests, branches, status, and follow-up in one place.

testimonial.quote: Good software should make the customer journey clearer and the team workload lighter.
testimonial.name: Servicely

process.title: How we build
process.description: A simple process for turning scattered customer messages and manual work into a useful digital system.

steps.title: Map
steps.body: We understand your customer journey, current tools, staff handoff, and repeated questions.

steps.title: Scope
steps.body: We define the first useful version, the must-have features, and what can wait.

steps.title: Build
steps.body: We design and develop the website, app, portal, automation flow, dashboard, or assistant.

steps.title: Launch
steps.body: We test the workflow, connect the needed tools, and prepare the team to use it.

steps.title: Improve
steps.body: We support hosting, updates, analytics, fixes, and practical improvements after launch.

partnerGrid.title: Built for MENA businesses, focused on Lebanon, Iraq and the UAE
partnerGrid.body1: Customer-facing teams need faster response, clearer requests, and less manual follow-up.
partnerGrid.body2: We keep the design familiar and the workflow practical.
partnerGrid.body3: The goal is a system your customers and staff can actually use.

meta.title: About Servicely
meta.description: Servicely is a practical software partner for MENA businesses, with a focus on Lebanon, Iraq, and the UAE.

hero.title: Practical software partner for customer-driven businesses
bodyLines: Servicely helps clinics, real estate teams, automotive businesses, field service teams, and growing companies across MENA build useful systems for inquiries, bookings, leads, portals, dashboards, and internal workflows.

intro.title: Technology should make customer journeys clearer.
body: We start from the real workflow: messages, questions, staff handoff, appointments, leads and reporting.
Then we build the cleanest useful system, from a public website to an intake flow, portal, app or dashboard.

items.label: Inquiry intake, appointment requests, WhatsApp flows and lead qualification.
Websites, portals, mobile apps, admin panels and custom workflow tools.
Support, hosting and practical improvements after launch.

localTrust.title: Ready to build something useful and easier to run?

cards.title: Clarity first
cards.body: A system should make the next step obvious for customers and staff.

cards.title: Useful before fancy
cards.body: We choose practical features that save time and improve response.

cards.title: Direct work
cards.body: You work close to the builders, so scope and decisions stay clear.

cards.title: Support after launch
cards.body: A useful system should be maintained, monitored and improved.
